repo.description: Free, local, open-source 24/7 Cowork app and OpenClaw for Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Qwen Code, Goose CLI, Auggie, and more | 🌟 Star if you like it!

terms.context_snippet: Build Pipeline (Reusable)
Build and Release
'🔨 Manual Build'
Verify Homebrew Cask
'📋 GPT PR Assessment'
'🤖 GPT Review'
'PR Checks (docs only)'

FROM node:20-slim AS builder WORKDIR /app # Install bun RUN npm install -g bun # Install all dependencies (including devDeps for build) COPY package.json bun.lock ./ COPY patches/ ./patches/ RUN bun install --ignore-scripts # Copy source COPY . . # Build renderer (no Electron ne…
